helmet.title: Trading Account Validation & Rebate Claim | FXPayout
helmet.description: FXPayout is a trusted forex rebate platform providing up to 90% cashback on broker commissions, paid directly to traders.

header.title: Verify Your Trading Account to Start Earning Rebates
header.paragraph: Complete the validation form below to link your trading account with fxpayout and start receiving automated rebates.

card.title: Trading Account Validation
card.paragraph: Complete the form below and follow the guidelines to verify your trading account.

bankForm.title: Deposit & Withdrawal Bank Data
bankForm.otherBankHelper: Ensure it matches your destination account to avoid transfer errors.

errors.holdingUsernameRequired: Account holder name cannot be empty

errors.captcha: Please confirm that you are not a robot

card.warning: *Your data is kept confidential and is only used for the verification and fxpayout rebate withdrawal process.

feedbackError.requiredFields: Form fields cannot be empty. Please fill in all data.
feedbackError.invalidEmail: Invalid email format. Please use a valid email address.
feedbackError.invalidBroker: The selected broker is invalid or not found.
feedbackError.invalidRebate: The selected rebate type is invalid.
feedbackError.captchaFailed: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
feedbackError.serverError: Internal server error. Please try again later.

terms.title: Account validation can only be done once.
terms.description: Please ensure all data is entered correctly. If there is an error in the form, please contact fxpayout support before submitting.

terms.title: Ensure all data matches your identity and trading account.
terms.description: Inconsistent data may lead to delays or rejection of the verification process.

terms.title: Use an active bank account under your own name.
terms.description: This account will be used for rebate withdrawals. Ensure the account holder name matches your records.

success.title: Trading Account Validation Request Sent Successfully
success.paragraph: The verification process takes up to 3 working days. A confirmation will be sent via email.
